body.title: Sweep all lab/ + design_docs/ read-refs to canonical paths — proven by grep zero
body.description:
**Problem:** ~80 read-references to lab/ and design_docs/ remain across docs/, devices/ code, skills/, scripts/, CLAUDE.md — stale pointers to retired locations. Folds the open T-day-close-audit-skill-stale-paths and the validated T-lab-claudecode-path-sweep (lab/claudecode->devlab/claudecode already done).

**Shape:** Guarded, exclusion-aware per-form replacement (blind sed is the trap — name still-live siblings). Map each form: lab/claudecode->devlab/claudecode; lab/design_docs[_for_igor]->devlab/runtime/memory (decisions/ etc.); lab/docs, lab/notes, lab/tools, lab/spikes, lab/seed -> VERIFIED canonical target (check each — some may be repo docs/ or devlab/spikes/, not blind devlab/). Prose/historical refs in docs/the_ownership_gap/ count too. Delegate-able to a cheap agent with the exclusion-aware step-by-step.

**Affected files:** docs/**, devices/** (hubert/__init__.py, igor/cognition/*), skills/**, scripts/palace_seed_decisions.py, CLAUDE.md, bin/superclaude, tests/hubert/* — per the grep landscape.
**Design rules:** canonical-memory-location law; delegate-mechanical-sweeps (exclusion-aware step-by-step).
**Scope boundary:** IN — read-ref replacement to verified canonical targets, proven by grep. OUT — write-paths (T-skill-write-paths-canonical); folder removal; ~/.claude/skills.
**Test plan:** `git grep -nE "(^|[^v])lab/|design_docs/" -- . ':(exclude)devlab/runtime/memory/**'` returns zero non-artifact hits (this decision's JSON artifacts are the only allowed mentions).
**Completion criteria:** grep for lab/ and design_docs/ refs (excluding the canonical store + this decision's artifacts) returns zero; every replaced ref points at a target that exists.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] datacenter_logs/<device>/<subsystem>/ is the log hierarchy. Never write to a flat — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle: `rollback()` must be idempotent — safe to call even if — applies: tags: pattern, pattern-001 (source: docs/design_patterns_inventory.md#PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle)
…and 38 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: Swept retired-path read-refs to canonical across the live fileset. claudecode 1:1 bulk (lab/claudecode->devlab/claudecode, lab.claudecode->devlab.claudecode) delegated to a subagent — 27 files, pytest --co green, pushed 1eb4d6d9. design_docs read-refs (igor cognition comments, legacy migrator, slate help, SPEC pointer) repointed by hand. Folds T-day-close-audit-skill-stale-paths (skill paths swept) + the done T-lab-claudecode-path-sweep. 2 logic bugs the sweep can't path-swap filed: T-cc-queue-rollup-misfiles-lab, T-cc-nightly-reads-decision-md. Proof: tests/test_lab_designdocs_ref_sweep.py::test_no_live_file_references_retired_lab_paths (red->green, allowlist grep-zero).
